info.title: FPR Demand Tools API
info.description: Flight Pricing & Revenue demand domain tools. Covers booking details, user profiling, fare cache, search simulation, promo labels, and MongoDB operations.

post.description: Search user profiles and segmentation data. Returns user segment assignments and profile attributes. Use when someone asks about 'user segment', 'user profile', 'what segment is this user in', or 'customer profiling'. Keywords: user segmentation, profile lookup, customer segment.

200.description: User profile and segmentation data retrieved successfully

post.description: Load user profiling configuration for a specific country. Shows how users are segmented and what criteria are used. Use when someone asks about 'profiling setup', 'segmentation config', or 'how are users categorized'. Keywords: segmentation rules, profile criteria, country configuration.

profileGroup.description: Country-based profile group code, e.g. ID (Indonesia), TH (Thailand), VN (Vietnam)

post.description: Retrieve flight booking details by booking ID. Returns flight segments, pricing breakdown, passenger info, and booking status. Use when someone asks about 'booking details', 'booking ID 12345', 'what's in this booking', or 'flight info for booking'. Keywords: booking lookup, flight segments, booking status.

Retrieve flight booking details as raw JSON format. Same data as get_flight_info but in machine-readable JSON structure. Use when you need structured booking data for analysis or comparison. Keywords: booking JSON, structured data, machine-readable.

200.description: Flight booking information in JSON format retrieved successfully

post.description: Retrieve booking log content from S3 storage. Shows detailed booking event logs for debugging and audit purposes. Use when someone asks about 'booking log', 'booking events', 'what happened during booking', or needs to trace a booking issue. Keywords: booking events, S3 logs, booking audit trail.

path.description: S3 path to specific log object

post.description: Retrieve winner details by winner code. Winners are the selected fare/provider combination for a booking. Use when someone asks about 'winner code', 'which provider won', or 'winning fare details'. Keywords: winner code, provider selection, fare winner.

Search winners by specification and conditions. Find which fares/providers won for specific routes or criteria. Use when someone asks 'who wins on this route', 'winner search', or 'fare winner analysis'. Keywords: winner search, provider analysis, route winners.

Execute direct MongoDB queries on demand-side collections. Supports GET, UPSERT, and DELETE operations on any demand_booking collection. Use when someone needs to 'query mongo', 'check mongo collection', or run a 'direct database query'. WARNING: UPSERT/DELETE operations modify data. Keywords: MongoDB, direct query, database operation.

Look up cached fare data for a specific route. Shows what fares are currently cached for a given origin-destination pair. Use when someone asks about 'fare cache', 'cached prices for JKT-SIN', 'what fares are cached', or 'demand cache by route'. Keywords: fare cache, route cache, cached fares.

origin.description: Origin airport code, e.g. CGK, BKK, SGN

post.description: Look up demand cache by a specific search ID. Retrieves the cached search results for a particular search session. Use when someone has a 'search ID' and wants to see what results were cached. Keywords: search ID cache, session cache, search results.

searchId.description: Search ID from a demand search session

200.description: Cache data by search ID retrieved successfully

post.description: List all available MongoDB collection names in the demand database. Use when someone asks 'what mongo collections exist', 'list collections', or needs to know which collections can be queried. Keywords: MongoDB collections, collection list, available collections.

Search promo label information and configuration. Promo labels are displayed on search results to highlight deals or promotions. Use when someone asks about 'promo labels', 'promotional tags', 'deal labels', or 'what promos are shown on search'. Keywords: promo labels, promotional tags, deal labels.

Get supporting data and options for promo labels. Returns available promo label types, configurations, and setup options. Use when someone asks about 'promo label options', 'label configuration', or needs to set up new promo labels. Keywords: label configuration, promo options, label setup.

200.description: Promo label supporting data retrieved successfully

post.description: Run a simulated flight search and return results. Mimics a real user search to test pricing, availability, and display. Use when someone asks to 'simulate a search', 'test search results', 'what would a user see for JKT-SIN', or 'run a search simulation'. Keywords: search simulation, test search, search results.
